posts.author: karol.lunar (Karoline Bastos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, I think i’ll be useful to have the ability to set items and subitems checkbox columns in automations.

Since some tasks assigned as subitens, in my case, are usually not suited for complex status. They’re just done or not done. I figured out it’s not possible to use checkboxes in this case, to automate main item status when they’re all checked. It’ll be very handy!
